name: @aurea/checkout-cielo
description: Cielo checkout - tests and tooling for Edge Functions

scripts.test:all: vitest run tests/unit && vitest run --config vitest.e2e.config.ts tests/e2e
scripts.test:e2e:report: vitest run --config vitest.e2e.config.ts --maxWorkers=1 tests/e2e/advanced-payment/split --reporter=json --outputFile=../../.context/e2e-report.json && node scripts/e2e-report-to-md.cjs
